Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.classgen
Generates compiled classes.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir
Intermediate representation before JVM byte code compilation.

    Description
    JavaClassIr
    The IR of the generated fun in the precursor form of a Java class.

    Class
    Description
    Allocation
    Where the local var is stored?
    AllocationSet
    Allocation analysis of localvars in a fast fun.
    BindingGenerator
    Generates insns of \binding.
    BytecodeGenState
    State of generation of bytecode.
    ChildJcirAccumulator
    Accumulates child JavaClassIr instances.
    ControlGenerator
    Generates insns of controls.
    Insn
    Thin wrapping records of GeneratorAdapter methods.
    JavaClassIr
    The IR of the generated fun in the precursor form of a Java class.
    JcirFactory
    Factory of JavaClassIr, stored in childJcirFactories field of generated fun classes.
    KeyStrSupplier
    Generates unique key strings.
    LetRecGenerator
    Generates letrec.
    LvarAccessGenerator
    Generates insns to access local vars.
    MakeFastFunGenerator
    Makes insns to make SSA funs.
    ProgramCounterSupplier
    Supplies program counters.
    TraceAccumulator
    Accumulates trace for compilation.
